'''Mavron''' was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] assigned to the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] around the time of the [[Caamas Document Crisis]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. During then-[[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon's]] attempts to reach [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], the ''Chimaera'' engaged the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]], disguised to appear as a battlegroup at least similar to Bel Iblis', in the [[Pesitiin system/Legends|Pesitiin system]]. Following the engagement, Mavron was ordered to attempt to trace the vector on which the pirates escaped in order to locate their point of origin. Six days after the attack, Mavron returned to the ''Chimaera'' with the disturbing news that the pirates final transmission before retreating from Pesitiin had been sent to [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]], which was subsequently relayed to the [[Kroctar system/Legends|Kroctar system]]. In his investigation, Mavron took the initiative to pick up a copy of the [[TriNebulon News/Legends|TriNebulon]] and discovered the apparent return of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], all of which he reported to Pellaeon upon his return. From Mavron's report, Pellaeon and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ardiff]] were able to deduce suspicions of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra]]'s connections with the pirate attack.
